personal.headline: Full Stack Software Engineer | React & TypeScript
personal.summary: Product-minded full stack engineer with 6+ years building accessible, high-performance web applications. I enjoy shipping end-to-end features, mentoring others and turning ambiguous problems into clean, maintainable software.

careerHistory.title: Software Engineer
careerHistory.description: Lead front-end development on a customer-facing SaaS platform, improving Core Web Vitals by 40% and mentoring two junior engineers.

careerHistory.title: Junior Developer
